title: Ultragungans

{{Quote|So yousa found da dorid module? Awful good. And hopefully yousa killin' a great number of Ultragungan Militia soldiers along da way.|[[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Nass]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:ORDMTGBD" />}}
The '''Ultragungan Militia''', also known as the '''Ultra-Gungan Militia''', was a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] paramilitary group based on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. Its members were known as the '''Ultragungans'''.

==History==
{{Quote|Some Gungan artifacts were stolen. Mesa nein' yousa to get dem back. In exchange, while yousa recoverin' dose artifacts, Mesa'll figure out a way to get past da security on Ultragungan battle droids, which includin' da one yousa seek.|Boss Nass, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:ORDMTGBD" />}}
The Ultragungan Militia fought the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]] during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. After the conflict, they kept a large number of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]], mostly [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s, as spoils of war.<ref name="SWG:ORDMTGBD" />
[[File:UltraGunganLair3.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The bottommost level of the [[Ultragungan Lair]], containing various [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]]]

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Ultragungans operated out of a series of camps near the [[Gungan Sacred Place/Legends|Gungan Sacred Place]],<ref name="SWG:FtPftUD">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Find the Passcode for the Ultragungan Droids|Naboo}}</ref><ref name="SWG:US">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other}}Legacy Quest: "Ultragungan Soldiers" on Naboo</ref> and a [[Ultragungan Lair|lair]] on an island in the [[Lasay Swamp]]. The Ultragungan Militia was in open conflict with the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] and with the rest of the [[Gungan society]].<ref name="SWG:ORDMTGBD" /> Sometime following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], they stole an artifact from [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]], broke it into six pieces, and scattered it across different areas of Naboo, namely the [[Darkwalker Cave (Dee'ja Peak)|Darkwalker Cave]], the [[Mummer bunker]], the [[Moenia University]] Hall, the [[Keren Bank]], the [[Mauler Stronghold]] and the [[Skaak Tipper Hideout]].<ref name="SWG:RaSPotsGA">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Recover all Six Pieces of the scattered Gungan Artifact|Naboo}}</ref>

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> Boss Nass hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to recover the six pieces of the artifact.<ref name="SWG:RaSPotsGA" /> The spacer succeeded, and in return, Nass assisted the spacer with recovering an experimental [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] droid module, a [[stochastic decision chip]], contained into a [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|super battle droid]] in possession of the Ultragungans.<ref name="SWG:ORDMTGBD" /> Boss Nass first suggested examining flawed Ultragungan battle droids for clues about how to bypass the hardware security on Ultragungan droids.<ref name="SWG:FtPftUD" /> The spacer then attacked Ultragungan foot soldiers and discovered that the super battle droid self-destruct security mechanism could be bypassed using a password. The spacer eventually found the password from an Ultragungan droidtech toolkit in the [[Ultragungan Droidtech Camp]].<ref name="SWG:US" /> With this password, the spacer was finally able to enter the Ultragungan Lair and destroy the super battle droid to recover the Old Republic droid module.<ref name="SWG:ORDMTGBD" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Ultragungans appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:ORDMTGBD" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Ultragungans were added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:Legacy Quest|Legacy Quest]]" with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
